description: Optimize a fantasy football starting lineup for a 7-player roster (1 QB, 2 RB, 2 WR, 1 TE, 1 FLEX) using PPR scoring projections. Record the lineup decisions.

natural_language.prompt: You are managing your fantasy football team. Using the provided roster with player projections, calculate projected points for each player using standard PPR scoring (0.1 per rush/rec yard, 1 per reception, 6 per rush/rec TD, 0.04 per pass yard, 4 per pass TD). Then select your optimal starting lineup: 1 QB, 2 RB, 2 WR, 1 TE, and 1 FLEX (best remaining RB/WR/TE). Mark each player as START or BENCH.
